1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior
<!-- What you expected to happen -->

## Actual Behavior
<!-- What actually happened -->

## Screenshots
<!-- If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem -->

## Environment

**Desktop (please complete the following information):**
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, macOS Sonoma]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 122, Firefox 123]
- Version: [e.g. IACP 3.0 v1.0.0]

**Mobile (if applicable):**
- Device: [e.g. iPhone 15, Samsung Galaxy S24]
- OS: [e.g. iOS 17, Android 14]
- Browser: [e.g. Safari, Chrome]

## Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context about the problem here -->

## Error Logs
<!-- If applicable, paste error logs -->

```
Paste error logs here
```

## Possible Solution
<!-- If you have ideas about what might be causing the issue or how to fix it -->

## Priority
<!-- Select the priority level -->

- [ ] `priority:P0` - Critical (blocks core functionality)
- [ ] `priority:P1` - High (significant impact)
- [ ] `priority:P2` - Medium (moderate impact)
- [ ] `priority:P3` - Low (minor impact)

## Related Issues
<!-- Link any related issues -->

- Related to: #[issue number]
